display_text: Butterfly, Cost: 5450: Provides agility, attack speed, damage, and evasion to become a powerful physical carry item. Grants 35% Evasion (stacks diminishingly) and +20% attack speed, making heroes extremely difficult to hit and boosting DPS significantly. A signature late-game luxury item for Agility heroes. Stats: Evasion: 35%, Attack Speed: +20%

display_text: Butterfly, Cost: 5450: Stats: +35 Agility, +20% Attack Speed, +25 Damage, +35% Evasion. The combination provides a massive boost to Agility-dependent heroes, significantly increasing their right-click damage output, armor, and attack speed.
search_text: butterfly stats, agility stats, dps stats, agility damage, attack speed stats, butterfly cost, Butterfly

display_text: Butterfly, Cost: 5450: Transforms Agility heroes into hard-to-kill physical damage dealers in team fights. The significant Evasion forces enemies to build counter-items like Monkey King Bar, and the high Agility provides armor alongside damage, increasing survivability and DPS.
search_text: team fight agility, carry survivability, dodge in fight, physical carry item, team fight butterfly, evasion tank, Butterfly

display_text: Butterfly, Cost: 5450: Situational versus Physical Damage: The 35% Evasion makes the hero extremely resilient against enemy physical damage sources, forcing them to either buy accuracy items or focus magical damage. Very effective against lineups lacking built-in True Strike.
search_text: butterfly vs physical, evasion vs right click, physical defense butterfly, dodge attacks, vs carries, physical carry counter, Butterfly

display_text: Butterfly, Cost: 5450: Synergy Build: Core luxury item for Agility heroes scaling with right-click damage and attack speed, such as Phantom Assassin, Templar Assassin, or Terrorblade. Its value multiplies on heroes who already have high base damage or critical strike abilities.
